description.ko: 초심해대의 극심한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 아쿠아-5는 가장 깊은 해구의 비밀을 밝히기 위해 첨단 음파 탐지기와 생물 발광 내비게이션 시스템을 갖춘 자율 탐사 드론입니다.
description.en: Designed for the extreme pressures of the Hadal zone, AQUA-5 is an autonomous exploration drone equipped with advanced sonar and bioluminescent navigation systems to uncover the secrets of the deepest trenches.

prompt: A futuristic deep-sea exploration robot named AQUA-5, sleek obsidian armor plating with glowing neon cyan bioluminescent accents, navigating through a dark oceanic trench, hydrothermal vents emitting smoke in the background, marine snow floating in the water, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution, deep sea atmosphere.
